blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,929 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
